moments.title: World Cup Semi-Finals
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 reaches its penultimate stage with the semi-final matches kicking off next week.

angles.name: Semi-final anticipation
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals are set! Who makes it to the final? Get ready for two massive clashes.

angles.name: Road to the final
angles.copy: Just two games stand between the semi-finalists and a spot in the World Cup final. The tension is real!

moments.title: Wimbledon Men's Singles Final
moments.blurb: The Gentlemen's Singles Final at Wimbledon wraps up the prestigious tennis tournament tomorrow.

angles.name: Final countdown
angles.copy: Centre Court awaits! Who will lift the Wimbledon Gentlemen's Singles trophy tomorrow? Don't miss the final.

angles.name: Tennis drama
angles.copy: All eyes on SW19 for the biggest match in men's tennis. Who's your pick for Wimbledon champion?

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, tees off next week at Royal Birkdale.

angles.name: Golf Major
angles.copy: Get ready for links golf at its finest! The Open Championship begins next week at Royal Birkdale. Who's your favourite for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Birkdale beckons
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Royal Birkdale for The Open 2026. Expect drama, wind, and incredible shots.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk next weekend, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Latitude vibes
angles.copy: It's almost time for Latitude! Henham Park is gearing up for a weekend of brilliant music, comedy, and culture. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Suffolk's big weekend
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is bringing the party to Suffolk next week! Get ready for an unforgettable experience.

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Top 40
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was announced yesterday, revealing the biggest tracks in the country right now.

angles.name: Chart topper
angles.copy: The new Official UK Singles Chart is in! Who's at Number 1 this week? Tune in and find out what's hot right now.

angles.name: New music
angles.copy: What tracks are dominating the UK charts this week? We've got the lowdown on the biggest hits and rising stars.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama
moments.blurb: Love Island UK continues to deliver daily drama as the islanders navigate relationships and challenges in the villa.

angles.name: Love Island update
angles.copy: Is your head turned by the latest Love Island drama? The villa is heating up and no one is safe!

angles.name: Who's coupled up?
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island. Who's found love, and who's on the rocks? Catch up on all the gossip.

moments.title: Suzanne Vega's 67th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Suzanne
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! Still love 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner'?

moments.title: Richie Sambora Turns 67
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and co-songwriter Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to rock legend Richie Sambora! What's your favourite Bon Jovi track featuring his iconic guitar work?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of the influential folk-rock band The Byrds, turns 84 on Monday.

angles.name: Byrds Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Monday marks the 84th birthday of Roger McGuinn from The Byrds! A true pioneer of folk-rock. What's your favourite Byrds song?

moments.title: Louise Redknapp Turns 52
moments.blurb: Singer, presenter, and former Eternal member Louise Redknapp celebrates her 52nd birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Louise
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 52nd Birthday to Louise Redknapp on Monday! From Eternal to solo hits, what's your top track?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt's 80th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across genres, turns 80 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Birthday for Linda
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! A true music icon. What's your favourite song from her?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: The Police drummer and co-founder Stewart Copeland celebrates his 74th birthday next Thursday.

angles.name: Police Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: Next Thursday, the legendary Stewart Copeland of The Police turns 74! Get your air drums ready for some classic tracks.

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen guitarist and rock icon Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday next Friday.

angles.name: Queen Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May next Friday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

moments.title: Carlos Santana Turns 79
moments.blurb: Guitar virtuoso Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, Latin, and blues, celebrates his 79th birthday next Saturday.

angles.name: Santana Birthday
angles.copy: Next Saturday, the legendary Carlos Santana turns 79! Get ready to groove to some of his timeless tracks.

moments.title: Kim Carnes' 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, famous for her husky voice and the hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', turns 81 next Saturday.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to Kim Carnes next Saturday! Still love 'Bette Davis Eyes'? We do!

moments.title: Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) Turns 78
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday next Sunday.

angles.name: Cat Stevens Birthday
angles.copy: Next Sunday, the incredible Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78! What's your favourite folk-rock classic from him?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Are Here!
moments.blurb: For many across the UK, the summer school holidays are officially kicking off or are just around the corner.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Or nearly! What are your plans for the long-awaited summer holidays?

angles.name: Holiday vibe
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here for many! Time for sunshine, fun, and maybe a staycation or two.
